title: Japanese Verb Conjugation Tower
description: Toggle morpheme layers (causative, passive/potential, polite, negative, past) and watch a Japanese verb assemble morpheme-by-morpheme in canonical composition order, with each tier highlighting the newly-added morpheme and naming its auxiliary (助動詞). Search 26,784 verbs by romaji, kana, or kanji — romaji is auto-converted to kana.

title: Pennsic Planner
description: Browse the Pennsic 53 (2026) class schedule as a side-by-side day timetable, build a shareable personal calendar with time-conflict detection (stored online and reached by a link), and export your plan to calendar (.ics).

title: Pennsic Mapper
description: Browse the Pennsic 53 (2026) camp map and build a shareable personal map of coloured, labelled pins, reached by a link.

title: Function Plotter
description: Plot a user-supplied function of x as an SVG curve.

title: Image Comparison Table
description: Side-by-side comparison grids of labelled images, with click-to-zoom lightbox and per-row prompt info. Shows a table picker by default; selects a table via the /<id> path or ?table=<id>, and scales to fit the viewport.
